---
title: Fonds de l'océan
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557534/ocean_20220318_nu0woa.png
description: Fonds de l'océan
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2022-03-18
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557534/ocean_20220318_nu0woa.png)
